markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[To review and update contractor payments in preparation for transitioning from Remote to Deal.](https://fathom.video/share/b47axarx8qdgkcDV5yuXyT8mQ_xwZnJ8?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Team is moving from Remote to Deal for contractor management and payments](https://fathom.video/share/b47axarx8qdgkcDV5yuXyT8mQ_xwZnJ8?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Transition timeline: Communicate Monday, approve payments Tuesday, send Deal contracts Wednesday, cancel Remote Thursday](https://fathom.video/share/b47axarx8qdgkcDV5yuXyT8mQ_xwZnJ8?tab=summary&timestamp=35.0)
  - [Several contractors' payments were reviewed and adjusted (e.g., prorated amounts, one-time payments)](https://fathom.video/share/b47axarx8qdgkcDV5yuXyT8mQ_xwZnJ8?tab=summary&timestamp=80.0)
  - [Molly will support Wiets in the transition process as needed](https://fathom.video/share/b47axarx8qdgkcDV5yuXyT8mQ_xwZnJ8?tab=summary&timestamp=1641.0)

## Topics

### Remote to Deal Transition

  - [Moving all contractors from Remote to Deal platform](https://fathom.video/share/b47axarx8qdgkcDV5yuXyT8mQ_xwZnJ8?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Timeline for transition:](https://fathom.video/share/b47axarx8qdgkcDV5yuXyT8mQ_xwZnJ8?tab=summary&timestamp=41.0)
      - [Monday: Communicate change to all contractors](https://fathom.video/share/b47axarx8qdgkcDV5yuXyT8mQ_xwZnJ8?tab=summary&timestamp=1587.0)
      - [Tuesday: Approve payments in Remote](https://fathom.video/share/b47axarx8qdgkcDV5yuXyT8mQ_xwZnJ8?tab=summary&timestamp=1595.0)
      - [Wednesday: Send out new Deal contracts](https://fathom.video/share/b47axarx8qdgkcDV5yuXyT8mQ_xwZnJ8?tab=summary&timestamp=1598.0)
      - [Thursday: Cancel everyone in Remote](https://fathom.video/share/b47axarx8qdgkcDV5yuXyT8mQ_xwZnJ8?tab=summary&timestamp=1604.0)
      - [Friday: Ensure no further payments in Remote](https://fathom.video/share/b47axarx8qdgkcDV5yuXyT8mQ_xwZnJ8?tab=summary&timestamp=1608.0)

### Contractor Payment Reviews

  - [Reviewed and adjusted several contractor payments:](https://fathom.video/share/b47axarx8qdgkcDV5yuXyT8mQ_xwZnJ8?tab=summary&timestamp=80.0)
      - [Changed some to one-time payments to avoid double invoicing](https://fathom.video/share/b47axarx8qdgkcDV5yuXyT8mQ_xwZnJ8?tab=summary&timestamp=89.0)
      - [Prorated payments for contractors starting mid-month (e.g., Daya working 19 out of 28 days)](https://fathom.video/share/b47axarx8qdgkcDV5yuXyT8mQ_xwZnJ8?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
      - [Adjusted payment schedules and amounts for various contractors](https://fathom.video/share/b47axarx8qdgkcDV5yuXyT8mQ_xwZnJ8?tab=summary&timestamp=609.0)

### New Contractors

  - [Identified new contractors starting soon: David and Nim](https://fathom.video/share/b47axarx8qdgkcDV5yuXyT8mQ_xwZnJ8?tab=summary&timestamp=912.0)
  - [Ensured their contracts and payments are set up correctly in the system](https://fathom.video/share/b47axarx8qdgkcDV5yuXyT8mQ_xwZnJ8?tab=summary&timestamp=930.0)

### System Familiarization

  - [Wiets is becoming familiar with the current system (Remote) just as they're transitioning to a new one (Deal)](https://fathom.video/share/b47axarx8qdgkcDV5yuXyT8mQ_xwZnJ8?tab=summary&timestamp=1364.0)
  - [Molly offered support in helping to transfer people over to the new system](https://fathom.video/share/b47axarx8qdgkcDV5yuXyT8mQ_xwZnJ8?tab=summary&timestamp=1641.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Wiets to send out communication about the transition on Monday](https://fathom.video/share/b47axarx8qdgkcDV5yuXyT8mQ_xwZnJ8?tab=summary&timestamp=1587.0)
  - [Approve all payments in Remote on Tuesday](https://fathom.video/share/b47axarx8qdgkcDV5yuXyT8mQ_xwZnJ8?tab=summary&timestamp=1595.0)
  - [Send out new Deal contracts on Wednesday](https://fathom.video/share/b47axarx8qdgkcDV5yuXyT8mQ_xwZnJ8?tab=summary&timestamp=1598.0)
  - [Cancel all contractors in Remote on Thursday](https://fathom.video/share/b47axarx8qdgkcDV5yuXyT8mQ_xwZnJ8?tab=summary&timestamp=1604.0)
  - [Molly to update her calendar and be available to support the transition process](https://fathom.video/share/b47axarx8qdgkcDV5yuXyT8mQ_xwZnJ8?tab=summary&timestamp=1641.0)
  - [Wiets to schedule any necessary meetings with Molly for Monday and Tuesday](https://fathom.video/share/b47axarx8qdgkcDV5yuXyT8mQ_xwZnJ8?tab=summary&timestamp=1641.0)
